howitworks.title: Připraveno k palbě raz dva tři
howitworks.subtitle: Nic se nešroubuje, nic se nekomplikuje. Tři kroky a jde se do akce.
howitworks.step1Desc: Začínáš, nebo chceš co největší dostřel? Poradíme ti s výběrem podle věku i stylu hraní a pošleme to rovnou k tobě.
howitworks.step2Desc: Vodní kuličky zalij vodou a nech je pár hodin, nejlíp přes noc, pořádně nabobtnat do plné velikosti. A je nabito.
howitworks.step3Desc: Kulička se při zásahu neškodně roztříští a zmizí. Žádné boule, žádný úklid — jen čistá zábava.

categorygrid.warrantyTitle: Everything we sell is covered by warranty
categorygrid.deliveryHighlight: as soon as the next day

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Answers to the {count} questions customers ask most. Can't find what you're looking for?
faq.sidebarDesc: Our team will get back to you within a few hours.
faq.ctaDesc: Didn't find what you were looking for? Our team is here for you.
faq.shippingQ1: How quickly do you ship orders?
faq.shippingA1: Orders placed before 2pm on a working day ship the same day. Everything else goes out the next working day at the latest. We always e-mail you a tracking number when your parcel is on its way.
faq.shippingQ2: Which delivery services do you offer?
faq.shippingA2: We work with three carriers: PPL (1–2 working days, 129 CZK), Zásilkovna with a pickup point of your choice (89 CZK) and DPD (1–2 working days, 119 CZK). Shipping is free on orders over 1,500 CZK.
faq.shippingA3: Yes, we deliver anywhere in Slovakia. The price and delivery time depend on the carrier you pick. You'll see the exact details when choosing shipping in the cart.
faq.shippingQ4: What if my parcel doesn't arrive?
faq.shippingA4: If your parcel hasn't arrived within 5 working days of dispatch, contact us at info@dodelat.cz or by phone. We'll check with the carrier straight away and sort it out.
faq.returnsQ1: How long do I have to return goods?
faq.returnsA1: Beyond the statutory 14-day period we offer extended returns up to 30 days from delivery. Just e-mail us and send the goods back to our address. The buyer covers the cost of return shipping.
faq.returnsQ2: What condition must returned goods be in?
faq.returnsA2: Goods should be unused, in the original packaging and complete (including all accessories and documentation). If the goods have been used or damaged, we reserve the right to reduce the refund accordingly.
faq.returnsA3: Report the complaint by e-mail to info@dodelat.cz with your order number, a description of the fault and a photo. We settle complaints within 30 days. All goods carry the statutory 24-month warranty.
faq.returnsQ4: When do I get my money back?
faq.returnsA4: We refund within 14 days of receiving the returned goods, using the same payment method you paid with — card, bank account, or otherwise as agreed.
faq.paymentQ1: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentA1: We accept card payments online (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay), bank transfer in advance, and cash on delivery (39 CZK surcharge). The payment gateway is secured with SSL encryption.
faq.paymentA2: Absolutely. Card payments are handled by a certified payment gateway with 3D Secure. Your card number never passes through our servers at any point.
faq.paymentQ3: When will the payment leave my account?
faq.paymentA3: With online card payments the money is taken as soon as the order is confirmed. With bank transfer we wait for the payment to land before dispatching your parcel.
faq.productsA1: Yes, we sell only genuine Apple accessories and products from verified distributors. Every piece goes through a quality check before it ships.
faq.productsA2: All goods come with the statutory 24-month warranty. It covers manufacturing defects and faulty materials, not damage caused by improper use.
faq.productsA3: Our current range is new goods only. If we consider adding refurbished products, we'll let you know through the newsletter.
faq.productsQ4: Can I try a product before buying?
faq.productsA4: We don't run a physical store at the moment. You can try any product after delivery and return it within 30 days, no reason needed, if you're not happy.
faq.supportQ1: How can I contact customer support?
faq.supportA1: We're available at info@dodelat.cz, by phone on +420 737 565 577 (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 10am–2pm), or via the chat on the site. We usually reply within a few hours.
faq.supportQ2: How long does an e-mail reply take?
faq.supportA2: We aim to reply within 4 working hours. If we're dealing with a lot of enquiries, we'll reply by the next working day at the latest.
faq.supportA3: Yes. Once your parcel ships you'll get an e-mail with a tracking link for the carrier you chose. You can also follow your order status in your customer account.
faq.securityQ1: How do you protect my personal data?
faq.securityA1: We process your data in line with the GDPR. We don't pass it to third parties for marketing. All communication is SSL-encrypted. You'll find the details in our Privacy Policy.
faq.securityQ2: Do you store my card number?
faq.securityA2: No. We never store card numbers and have no access to them. Payments are handled exclusively by a certified, PCI DSS-compliant payment gateway.

about.title: About us
about.heroDesc: A Czech shop for premium Apple accessories. Running since 2023.
about.storyTitle: It started with frustration over poor-quality accessories
about.storyPara1: Tired of cheap knock-offs that fell apart within a week, we set out to build a shop where quality isn't a compromise. SLINGR was founded with a single goal — premium Apple accessories at fair prices.
about.storyPara2: Today we supply hundreds of happy customers across Czechia and Slovakia. We've personally tested every product in our catalogue.
about.value1Desc: We only sell genuine Apple accessories from verified suppliers.
about.value2Desc: Orders placed before 2pm go out the same day.
about.value3Desc: Return anything within 30 days of delivery, no questions asked.
about.value4Desc: Behind every order there are real people who are here for you.

rating.recommend: of customers would recommend our store

shipping.title: Shipping & Payment
shipping.intro: We want your parcel to reach you quickly and safely. Pick the shipping and payment method that suits you best.
shipping.benefit1Desc: Orders placed before 2pm go out the same working day.
shipping.benefit2Desc: Every parcel is insured against damage or loss in transit.
shipping.benefit3Desc: Every product is packed in protective wrapping so it arrives in perfect condition.
shipping.benefit4Desc: Once dispatched, you get a link to track your parcel in real time.
shipping.shippingTitle: How we get your parcel to you
shipping.shipBoxDesc: Collect your parcel from one of thousands of Z-Boxes and pickup points across Czechia and Slovakia. We e-mail you as soon as it's waiting.
shipping.shipAddrDesc: A Zásilkovna courier brings your parcel to your door. Delivery in 1–2 working days.
shipping.paymentTitle: How to pay for your order
shipping.payCardDesc: Fast, secure payment through a certified gateway. We support Visa and Mastercard.
shipping.payWalletDesc: Instant payment with one tap. Available in Safari and Chrome on every device.
shipping.payTransferDesc: You'll get the payment details in your confirmation e-mail. We ship once the money lands.
shipping.payCodDesc: For delivery to your address you pay the courier in cash or by card. At a Z-BOX pickup point you pay in advance in the Zásilkovna app or via the link in your e-mail.
shipping.secureTitle: Secure payments — we protect your details
shipping.secureDesc: Online card payments go through a secure payment gateway with {pci} certification and the {tds} protocol.

cookies.section2: 2. What kinds of cookies we use
cookies.section4: 4. Full list of what we store
cookies.technicalDesc: Required for the cart, signing in and the security of the site.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Let us follow anonymous traffic statistics and improve the shop (PostHog).
cookies.marketingDesc: We don't use any yet — your choice applies the moment we ever add such a tool.
cookies.notedRevoked: Consent withdrawn and analytics data deleted from this browser.
cookies.tableIntro: Below is the exact list of what our shop stores in your browser:
cookies.browserIntro: Most browsers accept cookies automatically. You can manage them directly in your browser, where you can disable them, block them or clear your whole history. You'll find the steps in your browser's help:

claims.step1Desc: Describe the fault in as much detail as you can and attach photos of the damage. The form is further down this page, or you can e-mail us.
claims.step2Desc: Pack the goods in the original packaging or something sturdy enough. Include the printed form and proof of purchase (a copy is fine). Send the parcel to our address.
claims.step3Desc: Within 3 working days of receiving the parcel we e-mail you about the status. The statutory period for settling it is 30 days.
claims.step4Desc: Once the complaint is accepted you choose how it's settled — we send back a repaired or new item, or refund the full amount.
claims.return1Desc: Drop the goods off at your nearest Zásilkovna branch. We e-mail you the label free of charge once you've submitted the request.
claims.return2Title: Hand over in person in Prague
claims.return2Desc: Bring the goods to our branch on Wenceslas Square. We'll sort everything out on the spot.
claims.return3Desc: Send the goods to our address with any carrier you like. We recommend insuring the parcel for the value of the goods.
claims.return4Desc: Goods bought online can be returned without giving a reason within 14 days. They must be unused and in the original packaging.
claims.resolutionRepair: Repair / replacement with a new item
claims.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe in as much detail as you can what's happening with the product...
claims.next1Desc: The confirmation arrives in your inbox within a few minutes.
claims.next2Desc: Include a copy of your proof of purchase in the parcel.
claims.next3Desc: Send it to our address using the method you chose.
claims.errDescription: Describe the fault or your reason for returning
claims.title: Complaints & returns
claims.intro: Your satisfaction is our priority. We'll show you how to make a complaint or return your goods quickly and simply.
claims.descriptionLabel: Description of the fault / reason for return
claims.sentDesc: We've sent a confirmation to your e-mail.
claims.returnsTitle: How and when you can return goods
claims.consentNote: By submitting this form you acknowledge the {link} for the purpose of settling your complaint. Fields marked * are required.
claims.legalDesc: The detailed complaints procedure, your rights from defective performance and information about out-of-court dispute resolution (ADR) are in our full Terms and Conditions.
claims.errCooldown: You can send another request in {minutes} min.

cookieBanner.title: This website uses cookies
cookieBanner.desc: We need technical cookies for the cart and checkout to work — those can't be turned off. We use analytics cookies only with your consent, to measure traffic in PostHog.
cookieBanner.descExtra: We don't sell your data or pass it to advertising networks, and without consent nothing is sent to PostHog.
